sentences.target: Arrête de gémir, s'il te plaît.

translations.fr: Arrête de gémir, s'il te plaît.
translations.vi: Đừng than vãn nữa, làm ơn.
translations.nb: Slutt å syte, vær så snill.
translations.ro: Nu mai te văita, te rog.
translations.da: Stop med at brokke dig, tak.
translations.ja: 文句を言うのをやめてください。

tokens.explanation: Imperative 2nd person singular of 'arrêter'; head of the main clause, commanding the addressee to cease the action expressed by the infinitive.
Preposition introducing the infinitival complement 'gémir' after 'arrêter' (construction: arrêter de + INF).
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'arrête'; intransitive here, meaning 'to groan/moan'.
Subordinating conjunction 'si' (if), orthographically elided before vowel-initial 'il'; introduces the conditional clause 's'il te plaît'.
3rd person singular subject pronoun; impersonal subject of 'plaît' in the fixed polite expression.
2nd person singular clitic pronoun in indirect object function (to you) with 'plaire'.
Present indicative 3rd person singular; part of the fixed formula 's'il te plaît' meaning 'please'.

translations.es: Te quejas por nada, la verdad.
translations.zh-Hans: 说真的，你为点小事就抱怨。
translations.vi: Bạn than vãn vì chuyện không đáng, thật lòng.
translations.ar: أنت تتذمر بسبب لا شيء، بصراحة.
translations.hi: तुम बेकार बातों पर रोना-धोना करते हो, सच में.
translations.nb: Du klager over ingenting, ærlig talt.
translations.sv: Du gnäller över ingenting, ärligt talat.
translations.da: Du brokker dig over ingenting, helt ærligt.
translations.ja: 正直、たいしたことでもないのに文句を言ってる。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'gémis'.
Present indicative 2nd person singular; intransitive predicate meaning 'you groan'.
Preposition introducing the prepositional phrase 'pour rien' (for nothing).
Indefinite/negative pronoun; object of the preposition 'pour' in the idiom 'pour rien'.
Sentence adverb expressing the speaker’s attitude; modifies the whole assertion.

sentences.target: Il gémit quand il porte ce carton.
sentences.reading: /il ʒemi kɑ̃ il pɔʁt sə kaʁtɔ̃/

translations.fr: Il gémit quand il porte ce carton.
translations.ipa: /il ʒemi kɑ̃ il pɔʁt sə kaʁtɔ̃/
translations.en: He groans when he carries that box.
translations.de: Er stöhnt, wenn er diese Kiste trägt.
translations.it: Lui geme quando porta quella scatola.
translations.ko: 그는 그 상자를 들 때 끙끙거린다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他搬那箱子时会哼哼叫。
translations.ru: Он стонет, когда несёт ту коробку.
translations.pt: Ele geme quando carrega aquela caixa.
translations.he: הוא נאנח כשהוא סוחב את הקופסה הזאת.
translations.vi: Anh ấy rên rỉ khi mang cái hộp đó.
translations.ar: إنه يئن عندما يحمل ذلك الصندوق.
translations.nl: Hij kreunt wanneer hij die doos draagt.
translations.uk: Він стогне, коли несе ту коробку.
translations.hu: Nyög, amikor viszi azt a dobozt.
translations.hi: वह उस डिब्बे को उठाते समय कराहता है.
translations.el: Στενάζει όταν κουβαλάει εκείνο το κουτί.
translations.nb: Han stønner når han bærer den kassen.
translations.id: Dia mengerang saat membawa kotak itu.
translations.sv: Han stönar när han bär den där lådan.
translations.da: Han stønner, når han bærer den kasse.
translations.ja: 彼はその箱を運ぶときうめく。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'gémit'.
Present indicative 3rd person singular; intransitive predicate describing a habitual/ongoing action.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a temporal clause ('quand il porte ce carton').
3rd person singular subject pronoun within the subordinate clause.
Present indicative 3rd person singular; transitive verb taking the direct object 'ce carton'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'carton'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'porte'.

sentences.target: Ils gémissent depuis une heure dans la file.
sentences.reading: /il ʒemis dəpɥi yn œʁ dɑ̃ la fil/

translations.fr: Ils gémissent depuis une heure dans la file.
translations.ipa: /il ʒemis dəpɥi yn œʁ dɑ̃ la fil/
translations.en: They've been groaning for an hour in line.
translations.es: Llevan una hora quejándose en la fila.
translations.de: Sie jammern seit einer Stunde in der Schlange.
translations.it: Si lamentano in fila da un'ora.
translations.ko: 그들은 줄에서 한 시간째 징징거리고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在队里已经抱怨一个小时了。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺條隊度呻咗一個鐘頭。
translations.ru: Они ноют в очереди уже час.
translations.pt: Eles estão reclamando na fila há uma hora.
translations.vi: Họ than vãn trong hàng đã một giờ rồi.
translations.ar: إنهم يتذمرون في الصف منذ ساعة.
translations.nl: Ze zeuren al een uur in de rij.
translations.uk: Вони скиглять у черзі вже годину.
translations.hu: Már egy órája nyafognak a sorban.
translations.hi: वे लाइन में पिछले एक घंटे से रोना-धोना कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Γκρινιάζουν στην ουρά εδώ και μία ώρα.
translations.nb: De har klaget i køen i en time.
translations.id: Mereka sudah mengeluh di antrean selama satu jam.
translations.sv: De har gnällt i kön i en timme.
translations.ro: Se plâng în coadă de o oră.
translations.da: De har brokket sig i køen i en time.
translations.fi: He ovat valittaneet jonossa jo tunnin.
translations.ja: 彼らは列で一時間も文句を言っている。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person plural subject pronoun; subject of 'gémissent'.
Present indicative 3rd person plural; intransitive predicate. With 'depuis', indicates an action ongoing up to now.
Preposition marking duration or starting point; here with a duration phrase ('une heure').
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'heure'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of 'depuis' indicating duration.
Preposition introducing a locative phrase ('dans la file').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'file'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans', specifying location.

They've been groaning for an hour in line.
